title: Create monorepo benchmark fixtures
description: Generate deterministic multi-project fixtures for benchmarking recursive discovery and indexing. Include single-project and multi-project layouts.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Deterministic monorepo fixtures implemented in tools/benchmark_discovery_fixtures.py (single-project and multi-project generators).

custom.beads_acceptance_criteria: Fixture generator produces deterministic datasets for single and multi-project layouts; stored under tools/tmp during runs.
